# Data Source (hush_azure_app_access_privilege)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an Azure app access privilege in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_azure_app_access_privilege" "example" {
  id = "apr-eu12345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Azure app access privilege

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) The name of the Azure app access privilege
- `description` (String) The description of the Azure app access privilege
- `app_id` (String) The Azure application ID
- `app_config` (List of Object) The Azure application configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--app_config))
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedatt--app_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `app_config`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `roles` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--app_config--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--app_config--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `app_config.roles`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `scope` (String)
